index_subtitle: Real-time observatory of the Ant Farm colony
index_empty_text: Access the DF desktop, start a game and embark. Chronicles will appear here automatically.
oracle_subtitle: The Omniscient Chronicler knows every secret of this world
oracle_welcome: I am the Chronicler of {{name}}. I have witnessed the birth of {{civs}} civilizations and the fate of {{heroes}} souls. What do you wish to know about this world?
oracle_input_placeholder: Ask about heroes, civilizations, wars, artifacts...
